verified.tls: Let's Encrypt cert issued on first request via Caddy auto-https

postgres.schema_pushed: prisma db push --skip-generate (User + MagicLink + Session + ChildProfile + Character + World + Series + Book + BookPage + Order + UsageEvent)

auto_deploy.pattern: git fetch && git reset --hard origin/main && pm2 stop inklings; npm ci && npx prisma generate && npm run build && pm2 start inklings --update-env

Magic-link auth (Resend will send real emails since RESEND_API_KEY is wired)
Kid Studio (Sparky stub responses; live Claude path requires un-comment in lib/sparky.ts — dispatch 003)
KDP sample export at /api/book/export — once books are created
Auto-deploy: every 2 min cron pulls from origin/main
next_dispatches_unblocked_by_this_one: 003 sparky live (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY already in env — just needs code flip)
008 walkthrough video (now have a real live URL to record against)
